case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICES AGCY VS. JAQUARA RAMIKA SWAIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,840.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICES AGCY AS TO DEFENDANT SWAIN, JAQUARA RAMIKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JAN-07-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SWAIN, JAQUARA RAMIKA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-08-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-19-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR TO INFORM THE COURT OF CASE STATUS. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-18-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES AT PROGRESS REPORT HEARING, COURT WILL CONTINUE FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT. SETTLEMENT PENDING, DEFENDANT TO PAY $1840.00 AT $100 PER MONTH COMMENCING JUNE 26, 2008 AND CONTINUING ON THE 26TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL FULLY PAID. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICES AGCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWAIN, JAQUARA RAMIKA $1,340.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.81 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,415.81, DEFENDANT JAQUARA RAMIKA SWAIN NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SWAIN, JAQUARA RAMIKA HEARING SET FOR FEB-04-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JAQUARA RAMIKA SWAIN SET FOR FEB-04-2009 IS CONTINUED TO APR-08-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, COURT WILL GRANT MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICES AGCY

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JAQUARA RAMIKA SWAIN SET FOR APR-08-2009 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-03-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. PER THE PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT IS PAYING AS AGREED AND DEFENDANT SHOULD BE PAID IN FULL BY THE NEXT COURT DATE. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PER THE PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT HAS PAID ACCOUNT IN FULL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
